summary: Iter49 P2 batch (5 features) — 27/27 NEW backend tests PASSED in test_iter49_p2_batch.py (schedules 6/6, reviews 7/7, creator earnings 4/4, api keys 4/4, public API 6/6 incl. rate-limit 429 confirmed). Regression: iter46+iter47+iter48 = 37/39 passed (2 remaining Stripe Connect onboard failures are the known iter48 external platform-enablement issue, NOT a regression). Frontend Playwright smokes confirmed: /earnings page renders with all 11 data-testids (earnings-page, window-toggle, export-csv-btn, lifetime-usd/credits, window-runs, 4 mini stats, empty-ledger); /keys page renders with mint flow producing fresh-key-card + copy-fresh-key + api-docs; Schedule tab on /my-deployments toggles + sets daily preset + sched-next shows future timestamp (~24h ahead); ListingDetail /listing/:id renders reviews-panel + reviews-empty; VibeBuildPage /build shows bounty-prefill-banner with title 'TEST bounty prefill demo' and prefills the textarea. No console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: schedules.py.tick_scheduled_runs: catches Exception broadly then bumps next_run_at forward — good for not hammering, but no max-consecutive-failure circuit breaker. ENH: auto-disable after N consecutive failures so a permanently broken bot doesn't churn forever.
public_api.py rate limiter is in-process (collections.deque). Acceptable for single-replica per main agent's note, but already documented as a future ENH — fine to ship.

creator_earnings.export_csv: pulls up to 1000 rows by calling earnings_ledger in a loop; if a creator has >1000 events some entries silently drop. Add total + 'truncated_at' header field, or use a streaming response.
reviews.py.create_review: order-of-checks puts pydantic schema validation (422) BEFORE owner check (403) thanks to FastAPI; verified by test_short_comment_422 returning 422 on own listing. Good.

Marketplace.jsx fetches only published listings — if zero listings exist, `agent-title-link` won't render; not a defect, but main agent should consider seeding 1-2 demo listings for marketplace UX walkthroughs.
VibeBuildPage prefill requires both `bounty_id` AND `title` fields in sessionStorage payload — keep this contract documented at the SubmitToBountyModal write-site to avoid silent prefill drops.

success_rate.backend: 100% (27/27 iter49 + 37/39 regression incl. 2 parked Stripe Connect tests)

test_credentials: admin@nova.ai / admin123 ; freeuser@test.com / test123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — current, no changes needed)
seed_data_creation: Each test class creates+cleans-up its own resources (listings, API keys, reviews). No persistent seed needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter49 added 5 P2 features (schedules, reviews, earnings, api keys, public API). All endpoints under /api prefix; reviews under /api/exchange. Admin deployment id 9736667a4a2a4acca927acfb8de48a9c is the test target for schedule + public-API run tests. Public API rate limit is 60/min sliding window IN-PROCESS — tests should use light GET /runs (not /run) to avoid burning real bot runs. Bounty prefill schema requires {bounty_id, title, description?, reward_amount?, reward_type?} in sessionStorage('tfai_bounty_prefill').
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. The 2 failing iter48 tests (test_stripe_connect_onboard_creates_and_is_idempotent + test_stripe_connect_account_after_onboard) are the documented external-environment issue (Stripe Connect platform not enabled on test account) explicitly parked by main agent.
